visual_description: A man in a light-colored shirt sits at a desk, intently focused on a laptop screen. He adjusts a pair of large black headphones over his ears, his expression serious and concentrated as he looks at the computer. The dimly lit room suggests a late-night work session or a focused task.
audio_description: The audio is dominated by the rhythmic clicking of a keyboard, suggesting someone is typing. There is a low, continuous hum in the background, possibly from electronic equipment or an air conditioner.
